subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-08-05
subcodes.first_line: They say that had there been a spiritual world they would have sensed it. But, as a matter of fact, inability to sense a thing is not a proof of the nonexistence of that thing.
subcodes.first_line_orig: میگویند اگر عالم روحانی یا ملکوتی می بود ما احساس مینمودیم با وجودیکه عدم احساس شأنی نیست هر گاه عدم احساس کمالی باشد
subcodes.subjects: @rational arguments, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @proofs for the existence of God, @limits of the intellect, @man's distinction from the animal
